# Bill Hinostroza, Product Engineer

> Serial builder with 5 SaaS exits. Full-stack product engineer building with Next.js, Python, FastAPI, and AI.

## About

Bill Hinostroza is a product engineer who builds products from zero to acquisition. Over five years, he designed, engineered, and shipped five SaaS platforms, each acquired. He works across the entire stack: TypeScript, Python, React, Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS, Vercel, and AI/ML (OpenAI, Anthropic, Deepgram).

He currently runs Abriz (abriz.ai), his frontier lab for emerging technology, and is seeking product engineer roles at companies building tools for developers and creators.

## Key Projects

- [Abriz](https://abriz.ai): Frontier lab for emerging technology. ERP, AI, and developer tools. Active since Jan 2026.
- [Riftmatch](https://riftmatch.com): Competitive gaming matchmaking platform. Real-time rankings and tournaments. Active since Apr 2026.
- [Cue by Abriz](https://cue.abriz.ai): AI-native productivity tool built under the Abriz lab. Active since Jan 2026.
- Up-Time.io: Uptime monitoring with smart alerting and status pages. Built solo in PHP. Acquired.
- Web-Analytics.ai: Privacy-first web analytics and reporting. Built in PHP. Acquired.
- [dope.link](https://dope.link): Link-in-bio product built in PHP. Acquired 2022.

## Free Tools

Bill built 13 free tools available at https://snchz.co/tools:

- QR Code Generator: Custom QR codes for URLs, WiFi, email, text
- SaaS Metrics Calculator: MRR, churn, LTV, CAC with benchmarks
- AI Prompt Lab: Test prompts with GPT-4o Mini
- AI Bio Generator: Professional bios for any platform
- Social Preview Cards: Open Graph preview for Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn
- UTM Link Builder: Campaign-tracked URL builder
- JSON / JWT / Cron Debugger: Format, decode, and debug
- Invoice Generator: Professional invoices, print to PDF
- Link in Bio Builder: Downloadable link page
- Changelog Generator: Structured release notes
- Waitlist Page Generator: Coming-soon landing pages
- Device Mockup: Screenshot framing in device mockups
- Uptime Checker: Browser-side URL latency checks

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Python, FastAPI, Node.js, PostgreSQL
- AI/ML: OpenAI, Anthropic, Deepgram, Vercel AI SDK
- Infrastructure: Vercel, Supabase, Railway, AWS

## Target Roles

Product engineer, full-stack engineer, or founding engineer at companies building developer tools, AI products, or creative platforms. Examples: Anthropic, OpenAI, Figma, Linear, Replit, Vercel.
